chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.386 of 2023 M/s A.Z & Co. Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA 4741/23 Dated: 08.08.2024 Mr. Mohsin Shahwani for appellants. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Saifullah, Assistant Advocate General. Mr. Rehan Kayani for respondent No.6. Mr. Touqeer Ahmed Seehar and Mr. Hafeezullah for N.H.A. -.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant submits that he has been instructed by the appellant not to press this appeal. The appeal is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Chief Justice Judge
